sentences.arabic: يَقُولُ الْمَثَلُ: «إِذَا كَثُرَتِ الطَّبَّاخُونَ أَفْسَدُوا الطَّبِيخَ».
sentences.translation: Poslovica kaže: «Kad je kuhara previše, pokvare juhu».
sentences.translationEn: The proverb says: «Too many cooks spoil the broth».

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ كَثْرَةَ الرُّؤَسَاءِ تُفْسِدُ الْعَمَلَ.
sentences.translation: To znači da previše vođa kvari posao.
sentences.translationEn: This means that too many leaders ruin the work.

sentences.arabic: أَرَادَ خَمْسَةٌ مِنَ الأَصْدِقَاءِ تَرْتِيبَ الْحَفْلَةِ مَعًا.
sentences.translation: Pet prijatelja je zajedno htjelo organizovati zabavu.
sentences.translationEn: Five friends wanted to organize the party together.

sentences.arabic: تَكَلَّمَ كُلُّهُمْ فِي نَفْسِ الْوَقْتِ فَحَدَثَ فَوْضَى.
sentences.translation: Svi su govorili u isto vrijeme i nastao je nered.
sentences.translationEn: They all spoke at the same time and chaos followed.
